mini_task_spec:
Using the symbol brick, find all exported class symbols whose names end with the word `Exception` (i.e., the class name itself ends in `Exception`) inside the directory `test-repo/packages/core/errors/exceptions/`. For each symbol found, record the class name, the file path relative to `test-repo/`, and the 1-based line number where the `export class` declaration appears. Output a list sorted alphabetically by class name, one entry per line, in the format:

```
ClassName:relative/file/path:lineNumber
```

Example line: `CircularDependencyException:packages/core/errors/exceptions/circular-dependency.exception.ts:3`

Include all classes whose names end in `Exception`, including `RuntimeException`.

---
